board_family_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 primary validation board
plain_language_interpretation: The promoted March 13 -> March 14 board is presentation-ready as the main Mindoro validation board, provided the shared-imagery caveat is stated honestly.
notes: Built from stored March 13 -> March 14 reinit QA figures only, with the shared-imagery caveat preserved in the panel text.
status_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row
status_provenance: March 13 seed, March 14 target, explicit shared March 12 imagery caveat, active Mindoro-specific recipe provenance from the separate focused 2016-2023 drifter rerun, and the preserved raw scientific note that the stored promoted B1 run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage. This March 13 -> March 14 R1 label refers to the Phase 3B validation branch, not to the Phase 1 recipe-code family.
status_panel_text: Main Mindoro B1 Phase 3B observation-based spatial validation view. This page will use the March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row only. Phase 3B itself does not directly ingest drifters; it inherits the official cmems_gfs B1 recipe from the separate focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun after that four-recipe rerun found cmems_gfs as the historical winner and promoted it directly into official B1, while the broader 2016-2022 regional rerun stays reference-only. The stored promoted B1 run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage. Keep the shared March 12 imagery caveat explicit.
status_dashboard_summary: March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row only; the focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun found cmems_gfs as the historical winner, official B1 now uses cmems_gfs, and the stored promoted run remains tied to the existing R1_previous reinit lineage.

board_family_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 cross-model comparator board
plain_language_interpretation: The promoted March 14 cross-model board gives a clean side-by-side answer to the model-comparison question while keeping PyGNOME in a comparator-only role.
notes: Built from stored March 13 -> March 14 cross-model QA figures only; PyGNOME remains comparator-only and the shared-imagery caveat stays explicit.
status_label: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 Track A comparator support
status_provenance: Same March 14 target as the March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row; same-case Track A comparator support remains separate from truth and PyGNOME remains comparator-only.
status_panel_text: Same-case Track A comparator support attached to the March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row on the March 14 target. PyGNOME is a comparator, not truth, and Track A is not a co-primary validation row. Archived March 13 -> March 14 R0 comparator outputs are not part of this thesis-facing view.
status_dashboard_summary: Same-case Track A comparator-only support attached to the March 13 -> March 14 R1 primary validation row.
